data.body: 5977 RED: shown test test_title_validation.py (whitespace-only rejected create+edit lib/cli; ' hi ' accepted byte-identical) RED for whitespace variants (empty already rejected). Held-out oracle test_title_corpus.py: 30 pass (byte-identity corpus incl leading-dash/quotes/backslash/LF/CRLF/emoji/non-BMP/NFC-vs-NFD-distinct/255-max; U+2192->'->' exception; >255 rejection incl 1000; NUL round-trips byte-identically via lib+MCP) + 1 RED (whitespace rejected identically across lib/cli/mcp). Resolved 2 AC ambiguities vs the preserved 255-cap: '>=1000 char' is a REJECTION case (not round-trip); NUL round-trips (preserve-as-is), not rejected. Holding out corpus; implementer sees only test_title_validation.py + composer.py.
